title: Splunk security advisory (AV26-356)
description: On April 15, 2026, Splunk published security advisories to address vulnerabilities in the following products:
products: Splunk Operator for Kubernetes Add-on  versions prior to 3.1.0
Splunk MCP Server  versions prior to 1.0.3
Splunk IT Service Intelligence (ITSI)  versions prior to 4.21.2
solution: Review the references and apply the necessary updates.
